info.title: 6 Second Scribbles Room WebSocket
info.description:
Published realtime websocket contract for the multiplayer game.

The current implementation source of truth remains the Pydantic models in `backend/app/rooms/protocol.py`, with generated JSON Schema artifacts published under `contracts/jsonschema/`.

Representative payload examples live in `contracts/examples/`.

server.name: local
server.description: Local FastAPI websocket endpoint for one room.

channel.name: roomConnection
channel.title: Room WebSocket
channel.summary: Bidirectional websocket carrying all room gameplay events.
channel.parameterDescription: Short room code used to connect to a game room.

sendClientEvent.title: Client sends room command or event
sendClientEvent.summary: Browser sends a validated room event such as `join`, `player_ready`, drawing updates, or room settings changes.

receiveServerEvent.title: Client receives room state or broadcast
receiveServerEvent.summary: Server sends room snapshots, game state transitions, drawing relays, moderation events, and custom-category broadcasts.
